response.overview: In suburban Australia, a self-proclaimed vigilante known as “Ninja Man” struggles to balance delusions of heroism with the harsh realities of his chaotic personal life. Armed with improvised weapons, a dysfunctional “Ninja Mobile,” and an obsessive grudge over a stolen wallet, he patrols the streets in search of purpose — all while evading police, confronting mythical threats like Bigfoot, and navigating family breakdowns. Blending absurdist comedy with mockumentary-style storytelling, Australian Batman is a bizarre and heartfelt satire of superhero culture, masculinity, and small-town Australian life.
response.tagline: Justice has never been this unemployed
response.title: Australian Batman
